basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Repricing sharply higher: on 20 June Iran's military declared the Strait of Hormuz closed and the IRGC warned vessels away (physical closure disputed by U.S. CENTCOM, which says traffic is still flowing). The post-MoU de-escalation has reversed and the war-risk premium has returned. Brent futures are spiking in parallel, so this panel is directional rather than precise during the repricing — the figure below lags the move until the dashboard's live Brent feed catches up. Treat as indicative; watch tanker-transit data over the rhetoric.
